payload.label: tv
payload.long_description: Partial right-edge crop of a large black flat-screen television with a thin bezel; the screen appears off and glossy with blurred interior reflections, mounted close to a light-colored wall — narrow vertical crop, slightly pixelated; estimated distance ~2.0 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"tv","short_description":"black glossy flat-screen TV edge-crop","long_description":"Partial right-edge crop of a large black flat-screen television with a thin bezel; the screen appears off and glossy with blurred interior reflections, mounted close to a light-colored wall — narrow vertical crop, slightly pixelated; estimated distance ~2.0 m from the camera.","attributes":["black bezel","glossy reflective screen","screen appears off/dark","thin profile","partial/edge-cropped","wall-mounted/flush","vertical narrow crop","large size indication"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
